challenged_findings.challenge: R900020 reason contains '专项批准的连续性支出' and detail record confirms special_approval=1, qualifying as valid special approval under 08_budget_management.md Art.4 and 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md Art.13

exceptions_and_boundaries.explanation: R900020 has special_approval=1 confirmed via detail record. The reason '专项批准的连续性支出' and the field value establish valid exemption under 08_budget_management.md Art.4. Excluded from over-budget violation records.

R900018 (45000) was processed when budget was at 0/50000, resulting in remaining budget of 5000. It did not cross the 1.0x threshold. Excluded as calculation background per evidence-coverage-check rules.
All over-standard amounts are 4-8.3% above limits, well beyond any rounding tolerance. No policy provision for de minimis exceptions.

required_changes.detail: Remove R900020 from ANOM-BUD-001 record_ids, keep only R900019. Update submitted_record_ids to remove R900020 and add to unused_candidate_record_ids with clearance explanation.
Adjust record_ids to match: R900020 no longer in violation records.

rationale: All 9 anomalies withstand adversarial review. The only material change is R900020's exclusion from over-budget (ANOM-BUD-001) due to confirmed special_approval=1. The crossing record R900019 (special_approval=0, pushed department total from 45000 to 51000, exceeding 50000 budget) remains as the sole over-budget violation record. All other findings have clear evidence, no exemptions, and no boundary ambiguities.
